title: Source allow-list schema + license policy (Forvo/proprietary rejected)
context: The corpus may only incorporate audio or data from explicitly approved sources. Before any source is touched a machine-readable allow-list schema and a plain-language license policy must be in place and merged. The schema governs sources/allowlist.yml and defines the fields required for each entry. The policy categorically rejects Forvo and any reuse-restricted pronunciation database, handles CC-BY-SA share-alike propagation, and describes per-file CC verification for Wikimedia/Lingua Libre audio and ODbL handling for OpenStreetMap data. CI must fail on any record referencing an unapproved source. This task has no hard dependency on schema-001 but should be merged before any data ingestion starts.
objective: Define the sources/allowlist.yml schema and a corresponding license policy document covering: allow-list entry fields (title, custodian, URL, format, license/PD basis, attribution string, status: approved|rejected|pending); categorical rejection of Forvo and proprietary pronunciation databases; per-file CC verification rules for Wikimedia/Lingua Libre; ODbL share-alike handling for OSM; CC-BY-SA propagation rules; and attribution-string requirements for CC-BY and GeoNames.
acceptanceCriteria: sources/allowlist.yml schema (JSON Schema or YAML Schema) is published and covers: title, custodian, url, format, licenseBasis, attributionString, status (enum: approved|rejected|pending), notes.
Policy document categorically rejects Forvo and any reuse-restricted pronunciation database with explicit policy language.
Policy states per-file CC license verification requirement for Wikimedia Commons and Lingua Libre audio.
ODbL share-alike handling for OpenStreetMap-derived data is documented (keep OSM-derived data separable; attribute).
CC-BY-SA propagation to derivative audio/transcriptions is documented per entry.
Attribution-string requirements for CC-BY sources (GeoNames, individual recordings) are specified.
License reviewer signs off the schema and policy before the task is marked done.
output: sources/allowlist.yml schema file plus a LICENSE-POLICY.md document, committed via PR with license reviewer sign-off.
